text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Swan Stakes, where we promised to put
Bamboo Memory's skills to the test, is finally here!
As for how Bamboo Memory is feeling...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! I'm ready to go, go, GO!
choice_data_list: I can tell! You look really focused!
I can tell! You look really focused!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Honestly, I'm pretty surprised myself!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
My heart's burning up so hot, I feel like I might
explode! And I can't stop shaking! But my mind's
so clear!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But more than anything, I can't wait to get out
there and RUN!
choice_data_list: Show everyone what you're made of!
Show everyone what you're made of!
